node_schema.label: process/file/socket name
node_schema.stage_index: integer stage order, null for bridge nodes
node_schema.technique_id: MITRE ATT&CK technique id for generated stage
node_schema.role: hub | bridge | input_artifact | output_artifact | executable_artifact | internal

edge_schema.type: FR | RF | WF | EX | ST | RCV | IJ | LOAD
edge_schema.is_bridge: true when edge connects two technique clusters
